Though researchers have known about the KELT system for a while now, they used to think it contained only a single star.
KELT-2Ab orbits the bigger star, which is bright enough to be seen from Earth with binoculars.
KELT-2Ab orbits a star that is slightly bigger than the sun, within a binary system called HD 42176.
